message:
feat(alias): implement skill alias system with CLI commands

- Add ms alias CLI: add, remove, resolve, list subcommands
- Add list_aliases and delete_alias to Database
- Add AliasRecord struct for listing
- Support alias types: short, legacy, deprecated, alternate
- Include human and robot mode output formats
- 125 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
